'''Vergill''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vergill system/Legends|Vergill system]] of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It was an influential member of the [[Hapes Consortium/Legends|Hapes Consortium]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the planet's [[Archon (Vergill)|archon]] was [[Beed Thane]].<ref name="Jedi Eclipse" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{Mo}}
